title: fagara micrantha
intro: Fagara micrantha, also known as Zanthoxylum micranthum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. It is a shrub or small tree with medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, and has been shown to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. Fagara micrantha can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
